questions.question: Which Web/App Development concept best matches: markup language used to structure web content?
questions.explanation: HTML is defined as: markup language used to structure web content.

practice of making web usable for all users
process of verifying user or client identity
questions.explanation: HTML refers to: markup language used to structure web content.

questions.question: 'HTML' belongs mainly to which web/application area?
questions.explanation: HTML is mainly part of Web Basics.

questions.question: Identify the correct web/app term-definition mapping.
options: HTML -> markup language used to structure web content
Bearer Token -> markup language used to structure web content
Pagination -> markup language used to structure web content
SQL Injection -> markup language used to structure web content
questions.explanation: Only 'HTML -> markup language used to structure web content' is correctly mapped.

questions.question: A Bank SO IT application requirement states: markup language used to structure web content. Which concept should be selected?
questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to HTML.
